# northstar

> A free product management resource: 65 long-form case studies, original reviews and key takeaways for essential PM books (the short route), and curated YouTube playlists. The short route — our review and key takeaways, 5 min read. The long route — buy the book on Amazon if you want to go deeper. No sign-up required to browse.

northstar is a single-page resource hub aimed at PMs, founders, and operators who want to learn product management without paywalls, ad-stuffed listicles, or 14 dead bookmarks across Notion. All content is hand-curated by the maintainer.

## What's inside

- [Home](https://pmnorthstar.in/): The main library — browse all books, case studies, and playlists in one place.
- 30 essential books across Product Management, Startups, and Management — each with summary and direct external link.
- 59 in-depth case studies on real products and companies (Apple, Spotify, Airbnb, Slack, Netflix, Figma, Cred, Razorpay, Zerodha, Cult.fit, and 49 more) — full multi-paragraph deep dives, written as articles rather than bullet points.
- 19 curated YouTube playlists across 8 topics: Design, Product Management (incl. AI PM), Data Analytics, Product Analytics, Marketing, Branding, Startup, Finances.

## Case studies

The full list of 59 case study URLs is available in the sitemap: https://pmnorthstar.in/sitemap.xml

Each case study lives at `https://pmnorthstar.in/case-study/{slug}` where slug is a descriptive identifier (e.g. `cred-design-fintech`, `razorpay-pivot-fintech`, `apple-iphone-launch`). Legacy `/case-study/cs-{N}` URLs (N is 1 through 59) 301-redirect to the slug URL. Each page contains a 7-paragraph deep dive structured around: the company context, the core problem, the key decision, execution details, results, ripple effects, and lessons for product managers.

## Categories covered

- Product Management — discovery, delivery, prioritization, AI product management
- Startups — 0-to-1, fundraising, founder lessons
- Management — team building, leadership for builders
- Design — UX, UI, visual design fundamentals
- Data Analytics — SQL, dashboards, analyst skills
- Product Analytics — metrics, funnels, retention
- Marketing — positioning, channels, growth
- Branding — identity, naming, visual systems
- Finances — runway, fundraising, founder finance

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://pmnorthstar.in/sitemap.xml): All indexable URLs.
- [Robots](https://pmnorthstar.in/robots.txt): Crawler rules.
